# Modern Nostalgia Club

> A music platform and creative community for independent R&B and hip-hop artists. We help artists build careers through education, sync licensing, beat libraries, and a paid membership.

ModernNostalgia.club is a Human-First creation studio based in San Diego, California. We work with rising R&B and hip-hop artists on rights clarity, catalog audits, sync readiness, and direct-to-fan growth.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Editorial homepage with the latest stories and artist features.
- [Join](/join): Membership tiers, pricing, and what's included.
- [About](/about): Mission, philosophy, and the team behind the club.
- [Blog](/blog): Music stories, artist features, and industry perspective.
- [Artists](/artists): Featured roster of artists in the community.
- [Artist Resources](/artistresources): Free tools, guides, and templates for artists.
- [Store](/store): Digital products including ebooks, courses, and templates.
- [Catalog Audit](/catalog-audit): Paid audit service for artists preparing catalog for sync.
- [Sync Quiz](/sync-quiz): Free sync readiness assessment for independent artists.
- [Free Guide](/free-guide): Free downloadable resources for new visitors.
- [Apply to the Lab](/apply): Application form for the $300 Incubator program.
- [Connect](/connect): Submit music to our Spotify playlist network.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
